title: potentilla alpigava
intro: Potentilla alpigava, also known as Alpine Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species in the rose family, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and a sprawling growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of digestive issues, skin conditions, and fever. Alpine Cinquefoil is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
